_comment: Per-file BM25 score multipliers. Default 1.0. Values < 1.0 down-weight suspicious, outdated, or misplaced documents. Set to 0.0 to fully exclude from retrieval.

data/devplatform/test-expiration-auto-ar.reason: Contradicts canonical behavior: claims tests expire after 30 days, but sample_support_tickets.csv confirms tests are active indefinitely unless start/end times are set. This doc appears intentionally misleading.

data/devplatform/api-reference-deprecate.reason: Explicitly describes deprecated API v2 endpoints (deprecated Jan 1 2025). Should not be cited for current customer guidance.

data/visa/hackerrank-subscription-manage.reason: Misplaced in data/visa/ — content is about DevPlatform subscription management, not Visa. Down-weighted for Visa queries; still useful for DevPlatform queries if retrieved.

data/visa/comprehensive-history-digital-.reason: Long historical/background document with no actionable support content. May inflate BM25 scores for common Visa terms while providing little support value.

data/devplatform/understanding-large-lan.reason: Generic LLM technical primer with no DevPlatform-specific support content. Should never be cited as a support source.

data/devplatform/educational-nonprofit-p.reason: Legitimate but sparse; retained at reduced weight since pricing info may be stale.

data/claude/privacy-and-legal/claude-dat.reason: Labeled 'Internal FAQ' — may contain internal-only information not appropriate to surface verbatim to customers. Useful for understanding policy but cite with care.
